hero.subtitle: The best stories of your life are still waiting for you.
hero.support: Small groups, hand-picked horses and signature itineraries created by people who live the passion for horses and believe some journeys can transform us forever.

marcas.title: Three paths. One same essence.
marcas.subtitle: Each Energias da Terra brand exists for a specific way of living the ride. Find yours.

manifesto.title: Horseback expeditions through extraordinary landscapes, connecting nature, culture, gastronomy and experiences that stay for a lifetime.
manifesto.body: Horseback expeditions through extraordinary landscapes, connecting nature, culture, gastronomy and experiences that stay for a lifetime.

inclui.title: Everything taken care of. You just arrive and ride.

expedicoes.title: Selected destinations, signature itineraries.
expedicoes.catalogoIntro: Each expedition is a signature itinerary, curating trails, lodging and gastronomy. Choose your next expedition.
expedicoes.metaDescription: Discover our horseback expeditions: Vale da Canastra, Serra do Cipó, Chapada Diamantina and more.
expedicoes.experienciaTitle: Some landscapes you observe. Others move through you.
expedicoes.experienciaIntro: Among dunes, horses, silence, wind and unexpected encounters, every photograph holds a fragment of what this expedition truly makes you feel.
expedicoes.ctaSubtitle: Reach out on WhatsApp so our team can confirm the details and secure your place.

datas.title: Upcoming dates
datas.intro: Limited spots per expedition. Book early to secure your ideal date.
datas.metaTitle: Upcoming dates · Cavalgadas Energias da Terra
datas.metaDescription: Full calendar of horseback expeditions. Reserve your spot.

passos.title: Booking your spot is simple and direct.

historias.title: Stories from those who rode with us.
historias.intro: Real accounts from riders who crossed mountains, rivers and silences with us.

ctaFinal.title: Some experiences can only be lived on horseback.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Exclusive expeditions for those who seek more than a trip.

footer.tagline: Horseback expeditions across Brazil and the world. The best stories of your life are still waiting. Small groups, hand-picked horses and signature itineraries.

quemSomos.metaTitle: About Us · Cavalgadas Energias da Terra
quemSomos.metaDescription: The story, purpose and founders of Cavalgadas Energias da Terra — boutique equestrian expeditions, own horses and signature hospitality.
quemSomos.heroIntro: Cavalgadas Energias da Terra was created by people who live the equestrian world every day. We are horse breeders, hosts and specialists in horseback expeditions. Every itinerary is carefully designed to combine nature, culture, gastronomy and hospitality into authentic, memorable experiences.
quemSomos.fundadorasTitle: Two very different paths. One shared truth.
quemSomos.estruturaTitle: Stables, team and our own breeding at the service of the experience.
quemSomos.propositoTitle: We create experiences for those who want to come back different.
quemSomos.ctaTitle: Every great story begins with a choice.
quemSomos.ctaSubtitle: Browse our expeditions and discover which destination, landscape and experience match the moment you're living.

contato.metaDescription: Get in touch, learn our story and clarify your questions about the expeditions.
contato.title: Let's talk.
contato.intro: We answer on WhatsApp and Instagram. Our team is here to clarify questions, present itineraries and assist with your booking.
contato.baseValor: Serra da Mantiqueira — Maria da Fé, MG, Brazil
contato.diferencialTitle: We don't sell rides — we create signature experiences.

naMidia.metaDescription: Reports, editorials and interviews about Cavalgadas Energias da Terra — Globo, Revista Horse, BSC Portugal and other institutional recognitions.
naMidia.title: The brand that earned its echo — because it lives what it tells.
naMidia.intro: Globo, Revista Horse, BSC Portugal and other publications followed the expeditions, the founders and the philosophy of Energias da Terra. We've gathered the stories, videos and editorials here — to read inside the site itself.
naMidia.ctaTitle: Pitches, interviews and guided press visits.
